title: Status and tasks with dependency
excerpt:
I want to do when my first and third task is changed to “Done” then  my second task should status changed to “To Do”. There should be both of them “done” otherwise second task should not be changed. 
Thank you.

posts.author: Nurbek (Nurbek)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to do when my first and third task is changed to “Done” then my second task should status changed to “To Do”. There should be both of them “done” otherwise second task should not be changed.
Thank you.

posts.author: kwalker (Kristian Walker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Nurbek,

I can confirm that it would be possible to automate this with the plugin of Advanced Automations for Monday.com.

The script would be triggered on the Event Listener of when a status changes on an item and once it changed it would get the items and it would check is the first and third item in the done status and if it was it would update the status on the second issue.

I can confirm if you are interested in understanding this plugin further then you can reach out to book a demo to see how the plugin works here.

Regards,
Kristian
